isi.lyrics:
Lyric AM8IC - Paracosm

Romanization

Such is the destiny of all who forget God
What they trust in is fragile,
what they rely on is a spider’s web.
They lean on the web, but it gives way they cling to it, but it does not hold.
From this story we express god to the spider who makes the illusion by make him false dreams.

Hangeul

What they trust in is fragile,
what they rely on is a spider’s web.
They lean on the web, but it gives way they cling to it, but it does not hold.
From this story we express god to the spider who makes the illusion by make him false dreams.

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Moonbit - 이곳은 (I am)

Romanization

igoseul nege malhaebojamyeon
swim eomneun challanham sogui hollan
maeil dallajineun nae buranui
ondoneun machi soyongdori

ssodajineun gamjeongdeure jeongdabeun eopseo
hwaksin eomneun gyeoljeongdeure haedabeun eopseo
morachyeo gubichyeo amulji anneun sangcheodeuri
hyungteoro nama goerophijiman

geureomedo neoneun, geureomedo naneun
yeojeonhi saragago itjana
geureoni naneun kkeunimeopsi umjigyeobolge
geureona neoneun jeolmange ppajijin maraya hae

jeogoseun kkwaena meotjin yagyeongi
bamedo modeun geol da itge hae
jogeumman soneul deo ppeodeumyeon
daeul geot gati banjjakgeoryeo

mudyeojineun maeumdeure huimangeun eopseo
jogeuphaejin sigandeure dojeoneun eopseo
iksukhan miumi ttodasi neoreul jommeogeumyeo
golmabeorin nal apeuge haedo

geureomedo neoneun, geureomedo naneun
yeojeonhi saragago itjana
geureoni naneun kkeunimeopsi umjigyeobolge
geureona neoneun jeolmange ppajijin maraya hae

kkeutteogeomneun bami neoreul goerophyeo ogetjiman
aekkujeun uisimdeuri mallyeodo
gyeolgugeul mideumyeo kkeuteopsi beotyeonae

igoseul naege malhaebojamyeon

Hangeul

이곳을 네게 말해보자면
쉼 없는 찬란함 속의 혼란
매일 달라지는 내 불안의
온도는 마치 소용돌이

쏟아지는 감정들에 정답은 없어
확신 없는 결정들에 해답은 없어
몰아쳐 굽이쳐 아물지 않는 상처들이
흉터로 남아 괴롭히지만

그럼에도 너는, 그럼에도 나는
여전히 살아가고 있잖아
그러니 나는 끊임없이 움직여볼게
그러나 너는 절망에 빠지진 말아야 해

저곳은 꽤나 멋진 야경이
밤에도 모든 걸 다 잊게 해
